message:
test(cli): add parse tests for expanded robot NTM-compat aliases

Add 6 CLI parse tests covering the recently-added NTM-compatibility
aliases for ft robot subcommands:

- cli_robot_state_alias_panes_parses: ft robot panes --include-text --tail 7
- cli_robot_get_text_alias_tail_parses: ft robot tail 9 --tail 8 --escapes
- cli_robot_send_alias_write_parses: ft robot write 2 "echo hi" --wait-for done
- cli_robot_wait_for_alias_watch_parses: ft robot watch 4 "ready>" --tail 99
- cli_robot_search_alias_grep_parses: ft robot grep error --limit 3 --mode hybrid
- cli_robot_events_alias_eventlog_parses: ft robot eventlog --limit 6

Also update build_robot_quick_start() tips section to document the
full alias set: panes, tail, write, watch, grep, eventlog.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
